hero.title: You don't have to go far to leave the city behind
hero.subtitle: Reconnect with nature at Bursa Karavanlı Bahçe.

experience.title: What awaits you here
experience.lead: Far more than a caravan park — a place to slow down, breathe, and truly be with the people you love.

facilities.title: Comfort, in the middle of nature
facilities.lead: Everything you need is taken care of — the rest is left to nature.

gallery.title: A glimpse of calm
gallery.lead: Sunsets, fireside conversations, and moments spent in nature.

nearby.title: A region to discover
nearby.lead: Our garden sits just minutes from Bursa's most beautiful nature and heritage spots.

pricing.title: An escape that suits you
pricing.lead: With your caravan, your tent, or just for the day. Reach out for details and current availability.
pricing.note: Message us on WhatsApp for details, availability and a quote — we reply the same day.

faq.title: Good to know
faq.asideText: Message us on WhatsApp with anything at all. We usually reply within minutes.

contact.title: Your spot is waiting
contact.lead: WhatsApp is the fastest way to book or ask anything. We're just a message away.

blog.title: Notes from nature
blog.lead: Escape ideas, local guides and stories from the garden.
